Who We Are

Decades of Siding Excellence in NYC

New York City NY Siding started with a simple mission: to provide dependable and lasting siding solutions for New Yorkers. We've seen it all, from brownstone restorations in Brooklyn to modern high-rises in Manhattan. Our commitment is to quality craftsmanship, every single time.

Our approach is straightforward. We listen to your needs, assess your property, and provide a transparent plan with no hidden costs. We use premium materials and proven techniques to ensure a siding installation that stands the test of time and weather.

We're deeply rooted in the NYC community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local initiatives, and are committed to sustainable practices. Our success is tied to the well-being of the neighborhoods we serve.

15+ Years
1200+ Projects
98% Satisfaction

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

New York City NY Siding did an amazing job on my house in Queens. The new vinyl siding looks fantastic, and the installation was quick and professional. The team was very helpful in choosing the right style and color. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Vinyl Siding Installation
“

I had some damaged wood siding on my brownstone in Brooklyn, and New York City NY Siding was able to repair it seamlessly. They matched the existing siding perfectly, and the repair is barely noticeable. Great service!

David K. Wood Siding Repair
“

We chose fiber cement siding for our home in Manhattan, and New York City NY Siding did an excellent job with the installation. The siding looks beautiful, and we feel much more secure knowing that it's fire-resistant. The crew was punctual and professional!

Jennifer L. Fiber Cement Siding Installation
“

Our old siding was falling apart, so we hired New York City NY Siding to replace it. They were fantastic from start to finish. They helped us choose the right siding for our budget, and the installation was flawless. Our house looks brand new!

“

I had a small section of siding that was damaged by a storm, and New York City NY Siding was able to repair it quickly and efficiently. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent. I would definitely use them again.

Susan B. Siding Repair
“

We needed new siding for our retail space in the Bronx, and New York City NY Siding provided a great solution. The new siding looks fantastic and has significantly improved the appearance of our building. The team was professional and easy to work with.

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does vinyl siding last in NYC's climate?
With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 20-40 years, even in New York City's challenging weather conditions. We use high-quality materials that are resistant to fading, cracking, and warping.
Is vinyl siding energy-efficient?
Yes, insulated vinyl siding can significantly improve your home's energy efficiency by reducing heat loss in the winter and heat gain in the summer. This can lead to lower energy bills and a more comfortable living environment.
Can you install vinyl siding over existing siding?
In some cases, we can install vinyl siding over existing siding, but it depends on the condition of the existing siding and the type of material. We will assess your property and provide a recommendation that is best for your situation.
